pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.ps1 which explicitly copies survey_points.csv to the SurveyData folder on the Desktop.
Counted exactly 204 data rows in the survey_points.csv file (indices 1 to 204, plus 1 header row).
Verified by calculating coordinate ranges from the data (Eastings ~474k-482k, Northings ~4394k-4399k), which accurately maps to UTM Zone 13N.
Geographic lookup of the UTM Zone 13N coordinates resolves precisely to the foothills west of Denver, Colorado.
TopoCal is a native Spanish topographic software, and its user interface menus (e.g., 'Archivo') are inherently in Spanish.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires importing the synthetically generated 'survey_points.csv' file, which contains exactly 204 survey points. The coordinate ranges in the CSV (Eastings ~474k-482k, Northings ~4394k-4399k) confirm they correspond to UTM Zone 13N in the Colorado foothills area. The target software, TopoCal, natively uses a Spanish menu interface (e.g., 'Archivo').
